title: MultisigToken
description: multisig v0.1 JSON Schema — 6 required fields

multisigVersion.description: ms protocol version (decoupled from token.specVersion / cspVersion; v0.1 sole value '1.0.0')

threshold.description: the n in an n-of-m threshold; values exceeding signers.length are caught by the runtime fail-closed guard

signers.$comment: uniqueItems applies to the full SignerInfo object (whole-object hash uniqueness). The stronger constraint that signers[i].id values are pairwise distinct is enforced by the runtime createMultisigToken factory and verify pipeline (fail-closed).

merkleRoot.description: Merkle root of the signer set (SHA-256; base64url or hex encoding; hex 64-char matches the wire-format-freeze; canonicalHash defaults to hex output)

inclusionProofs.$comment: I4 requires inclusionProofs.length === signers.length and the signerId set to map 1:1 onto the signers[i].id set — enforced by the runtime createMultisigToken factory and verify pipeline step 7.3.0 fail-closed guard (Schema uniqueItems is a whole-object uniqueness constraint; the by-field signerId uniqueness constraint is acknowledged as a spec boundary)

signerId.description: ID of the corresponding signer (DID or UUID v4; maps 1:1 to signers[i].id)

path.description: Merkle audit path (RFC 6962 base64url-serialized byte array; length 1-8192)

csp.description: embedded CanonicalSignedPayload (reuses the csp v0.1 5-required-field baseline + cspVersion metadata; ms does not redefine the signed payload)

SignerInfo.description: metadata for a single signer (4 required fields; id accepts DID or UUID v4; role is the human/agent enum; not weighted in the quorum)

id.description: signer ID; DID (did:* prefix) or UUID v4 (short-lived session scenarios)

role.description: signer role; not weighted in the quorum (collusion defense); used only as a classification label at issuance + for Merkle leaf encoding consistency

publicKey.description: Ed25519 public key (hex 32-byte or base64url 43-char; @noble/curves; no fallback to other algorithms allowed)

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (hex 64-byte or base64url 86-char; signed over canonicalSerialize(csp signed payload))
